roa.docketEntryComment: /X:COUNSEL STIPULATED TO AMEND COUNT 1, 653(F)(D)PC MISD//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/ENTER SENTENCE REMARK IN THE ABOVE SPACE,  THEN DELETE THIS LINE AND BELOW,***GO TO CHARGE TAB AND ENTER  NL  IN PLEA BOX FOR APPROPRIATE COUNTS******ENTER  G  IN FINDING BOX FOR ALL APPROPRIATE COUNTS***

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING//WIT SWORN:OFFICER RICHARD GOSS, SFPD/EXHMA:1=ANALYZED EVIDENCE ENVELOPE//EXHMA:1A=LARGE PLASTIC BAGGIE WITH 3 SMALLER PLASTIC BAGGIES CONTAINING WHITE CRYSTALLINE MATTER/EXHMA:1B=SFPD CRIME LAB NARCOTICS ANALYSIS FORM//EXHMA:1A1=CLEAR BAGGIE WITH A FOLDED PIECE OF PAPER CONTAINING SUSPECTED NARCOTICS/EXHMA:1A2=CLEAR BAGGIE WITH 2 DARK BINDLES AND PIECES OF SHREDDEDCOPPER-COLORED METAL/EXHMA:1A3=CLEAR BAGGIE WITH OFF-WHITE RESIDUE/X:EXHIBITS 1A1 AND 1A2 ARE MOVED INTO EVIDENCE/X:EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO THE SFPD/HTA1:1, 2/X:COUNT 3 IS CERTIFIED AS A MISDEMEANOR/BAIL:ORPJ/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/ STWPX/ORPJ/X:DEFT TO REPORT TO ORPJ 2 X A WEEK/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
